title: cordia obliqua var. wallichii
intro: Cordia obliqua var. wallichii, also known as the 'Winged Tree', is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae, native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cordia obliqua var. wallichii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of heart disease, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory disorders such as bronchitis and asthma. Cordia obliqua var. wallichii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
